criteria.criterion: Wake word triggers voice activation, UI shows listening state
Face detection: sense.js emits face_detected, hub.js broadcasts via WS
Gesture detection: sense.js emits gesture event via WS
STT local-first: sensevoice used when available
STT cloud fallback: switches to openai whisper when local unavailable
TTS local-first: kokoro used when available
TTS cloud fallback: switches to openai tts when local unavailable
